title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology discusses how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than traditional methods and reshapes cybersecurity defense strategies. The video covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning, DevSecOps integration, and cybersecurity risk management in the context of AI capabilities.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than traditional methods and how that capability reshapes cybersecurity defense. The discussion centers on AI-driven vulnerability scanning, DevSecOps integration, and cybersecurity risk management as AI capabilities expand. The framing raises the dual-use tension: the same scanning power that strengthens defense can also surface exploits, making AI safety part of the risk calculation.
